artifacts.name: exportService
artifacts.description: exportModelJSON (versioned JSON download via Blob+anchor) + importModelJSON (validation + XSS sanitization via allowlists). Version 1.0.0 format with exportedAt ISO timestamp.

artifacts.name: ActionBar
artifacts.description: Save/Load/Export/Import buttons with data-testid=btn-export and data-testid=btn-import. FileReader-based import with error isolation (CLR-05). Auto-dismiss notifications.

artifacts.name: Notification
artifacts.description: Auto-dismissing success/error notification overlay with role=status aria-live=polite for NFR-A11Y-001. Robust error detection via .includes('error').

artifacts.name: exportService-tests
artifacts.description: Unit tests: T-FE-SHARE-001-01 (versioned JSON), T-FE-SHARE-001-02 (import valid), T-FE-SHARE-001-03 (import error), download trigger test.

artifacts.name: ActionBar-tests
artifacts.description: Component tests: T-FE-SHARE-001-04 (export button), import success/error behavioral tests, btn-export/btn-import testid assertions.

artifacts.name: e2e-tests
artifacts.description: Playwright E2E: T-E2E-AFOL-001-01 (AFOL build+export flow), T-E2E-ERR-001-01 (invalid import), T-SEC-SEC-001-01 (no external requests).

artifacts.name: implementation-PR
artifacts.description: [area:frontend] FR-SHARE-001: JSON Export & Import Implementation (#17) — open, ready for review

artifacts.name: test-PR
artifacts.description: [area:frontend] Frontend tests for FR-SHARE-001 JSON Export & Import (#17) — test suite PR

summary.work_completed: Verified FR-SHARE-001 (JSON Export & Import) implementation is complete on feature/17-json-export-import. All 7 test IDs from PR #51 are satisfied. PR #55 is open and ready for frontend-review-agent. Production code (exportService.ts, ActionBar.tsx, Notification.tsx) and all test files are present on the branch.
key_findings: exportService.ts: exportModelJSON uses Blob+anchor download (cross-browser), importModelJSON validates version+bricks fields and sanitizes all fields against allowlists (XSS prevention per NFR-SEC-002)
ActionBar.tsx: btn-export triggers exportModelJSON with current bricks, btn-import triggers hidden file input + FileReader, errors caught and shown as notification without corrupting scene (CLR-05)
Notification.tsx: role=status aria-live=polite for screen reader support (NFR-A11Y-001), robust error detection via .includes('error') case-insensitive
All 7 test IDs satisfied: T-FE-SHARE-001-01 through 04 (unit/component), T-E2E-AFOL-001-01, T-E2E-ERR-001-01, T-SEC-SEC-001-01 (E2E/security)
Versioned JSON format: version='1.0.0' + exportedAt ISO timestamp enables future schema migrations

recommended_actions: Verify exportService.ts: exportModelJSON uses Blob+anchor, importModelJSON validates version+bricks fields and sanitizes all fields
Verify XSS sanitization: type/colorId/rotation allowlists, id truncated to 64 chars (NFR-SEC-002)
Verify ActionBar.tsx: btn-export triggers exportModelJSON, btn-import triggers FileReader, errors show notification without corrupting scene (CLR-05)
Verify Notification.tsx: role=status aria-live=polite, auto-dismisses after 3s, robust error detection
Cross-reference test PR #51 to confirm all 7 test IDs are satisfied by the implementation
Check that bricks.length display in ActionBar matches E2E test expectation (text=/\d+ bricks/)
